posts.text:
It is important that our Committee conducts a serious and thorough investigation in the Epstein case.

I look forward to speaking with Tova Noel, who was the last person to see Jeffrey Epstein alive. We have lots of questions.

Video

posts.text:
Trump’s weaponization of the DOJ is dangerous, and blocking his attacks against Jerome Powell was the right thing to do.

The Fed must remain an independent agency, as it has always been.

Video

posts.text:
Antisemitic attacks are on the rise, and the recent assault on Temple Israel in Michigan is horrifying.

Violence against places of worship and against our communities must end. Grateful that local law enforcement here at home is stepping up patrols.

posts.text:
This is Annie Farmer, a survivor of Jeffrey Epstein's horrific abuse.

We are fighting for her, her sister Maria, and so many others every single day. And we won't stop until we get justice.

posts.text:
Oversight Democrats are keeping the pressure on the DOJ and Epstein's estate until they release all the files in their possession.

Our investigation is far from over. We have a ton of important testimonies coming up, including today's deposition of Epstein's personal accountant.

Video
